Symbolic kernel candidate — not a proof of RH

Delta = Abs(t_i - t_j)
m = (t_i + t_j)/2

K(t_i, t_j) = -553.7458638041821*Delta**2*m - 554.4842989599199*Delta**2 - 507.2735568068967*Delta*m - 479.2728014119842*Delta - 530.2768611316633*m**2 - 460.6291535056833*m - 513.5036876547384*log(Delta + 1) - 442.1989444920241*sin(4*Delta) + 560.8712665704771*sin(5*Delta) + 1554.334479105483*sin(6*Delta) - 1674.140857047161*sin(7*Delta) - 528.6665111077945*sin(4*m) + 1322.983877022415*sin(6*m) - 1327.024619182516*sin(7*m) - 1276.50757598408*cos(3*Delta) - 910.0426697873621*cos(4*Delta) + 663.9276081447264*cos(5*Delta) - 1059.925618329288*cos(3*m) - 736.208406386045*cos(4*m) + 562.0329181819652*cos(5*m) + 618.5409796894629*cos(t_i*log(t_j + 1)) + 619.258597382567*cos(t_j*log(t_i + 1)) + 546.4840796970728*cos(2*log(Delta + m + 1)) + 470.3372338284844*cos(3*log(Delta + m + 1)) + 737.7995855738332/(Delta + 1)
